overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character exploring a coastal beach environment. The character walks along sandy shores with forested cliffs, passes by a distant city skyline, and explores the shoreline including walking through shallow water. Bright sunny weather with clear skies throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with forested headland

events.description: camera pans right to reveal distant city skyline across the water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach with the ocean to the right and forested cliff to the left

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff covered with dense green forest rising from the beach
expansive white sand beach stretching along the coastline
calm blue ocean water extending to the horizon
urban skyline with tall buildings and mountains visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny, open beach with a forested cliff on the left and calm ocean on the right. As the camera pans, a distant city skyline with modern high-rises becomes visible across the water, indicating an urban area nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach with urban backdrop and approaching tree line

events.description: character turns and begins walking toward the tree line at the cliff base

agents.ego_description: turning inland and walking toward the tree-covered area and rocky cliff base

entered.detail: scattered green trees growing at the base of the cliff
tall brown and glass buildings visible in the distant city

segments.scene_description: The character turns toward the cliff base and walks past scattered coastal trees while the distant city remains visible across the water. The vegetation becomes denser as the character approaches the rocky cliff area.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded beach area at base of rocky cliff with vegetation

events.description: character steps from sand into shallow ocean water at the shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking along the base of the rocky cliff through patches of coastal vegetation and shade

entered.detail: steep textured rock face with layered sedimentary formations
bushes and grasses growing in the sand at the cliff base

segments.scene_description: The character explores the shaded area at the base of the rocky cliff, passing through coastal vegetation. The scene becomes more enclosed as the cliff face looms closer, and the character eventually steps into the shallow water at the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow shoreline water at cliff base

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow ocean water along the shoreline under the cliff overhang

entered.detail: calm shallow water lapping against the shore with visible sandy bottom
overhanging rock formation creating shade over the water

segments.scene_description: The character wades through shallow water along the shoreline, moving under the shade of the cliff overhang. The water is calm and clear, with the distant city skyline visible across the bay as the character continues exploring the waterline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bright coastline that shifts from an open beach to the shaded enclosure of a rocky cliffside. It begins with the character walking along a sunny shore between a forested cliff and the calm ocean, as the camera pans to reveal a distant city skyline of modern high-rises across the water. As the character turns toward the cliff base, the scene transitions from open sand to denser coastal vegetation while the urban skyline remains a constant fixture on the horizon. The environment then becomes more enclosed as the character moves into the shade of the looming rocky cliff face, passing through thick greenery before stepping into the clear, shallow water. Finally, the camera follows the character as they wade along the waterline under the cliff's overhang, maintaining a view of the distant city across the bay.
